description: Upgrade: Brutal Swing hits all targets in a 2-space arc.
Upgrade: while holding the line, adjacent allies gain +1 physical resistance.
Upgrade: Snap Shot fires a second round at the same target (same Moment).
Mutation: Quick Step also breaks one grapple or pin when used.
Upgrade: Pattern Read reveals the scheduled Moments of ALL enemies until Clock reset.
Upgrade: Mental Static also delays the target's next scheduled action by 1 Moment.
Upgrade: Camera Call's doubling extends through the target's next TWO actions.
Mutation: Say the Line becomes your signature - crowd reaction triggers even out of combat.
